overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a rainy, foggy futuristic city plaza with towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and pedestrians carrying umbrellas. The camera moves from looking up at the Militech building, through a crowded plaza with wet reflective pavement, up at holographic koi fish swimming between buildings, and finally under a curved overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza looking up at corporate towers

events.description: camera pans down from looking up at Militech tower to street level

agents.ego_description: standing still looking up at the towering Militech building, then panning down to street level

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with Militech signage and red illuminated sections near the top
curved modern street lamp with bright white LED light
elevated curved pedestrian walkway with glass railings and concrete structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view looking up at the massive Militech tower through foggy rain. The camera slowly pans down from the skyscraper to street level, revealing a wet concrete plaza and a modern street lamp. The curved overpass walkway is visible to the right, and the area is devoid of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian plaza with corporate advertising and holographic displays

events.description: passing through crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas, wet reflective pavement visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza among pedestrians, navigating around people with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person with white umbrella walking toward camera wearing dark jacket
person sitting on bench using electronic device

entered.detail: building facade with large Petrochem corporate logo and envelope symbol
large translucent blue holographic fish swimming in the air between buildings
concrete and metal benches with people sitting
tall vertical digital advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The camera walks forward through a moderately crowded pedestrian plaza. The Petrochem building dominates the left side with its corporate signage, while a large blue holographic koi fish swims through the air on the right. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk in various directions across the wet reflective pavement, and some sit on benches to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon looking up at holographic advertisements between skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to track holographic fish swimming overhead between buildings

agents.ego_description: looking up at the holographic fish swimming between the skyscrapers, tracking their movement

entered.detail: large golden orange holographic fish with flowing translucent fins

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on the sky between towering buildings. A golden holographic koi fish swims into view from the left while the blue koi moves toward the center. The foggy sky creates a muted backdrop for the glowing holographic advertisements floating between the corporate towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath curved overpass with stairs

events.description: walking under the curved overpass structure, lighting shifts to artificial under the cover

agents.ego_description: walking under and past the curved overpass, continuing through the plaza with fewer pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white dress walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading up to the elevated overpass walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the large curved overpass walkway, entering a more sheltered area with artificial lighting. The golden and blue holographic fish disappear from view as the camera passes beneath the concrete and glass structure. A staircase leads up to the overpass on the right, and sparse pedestrians continue walking through the covered plaza area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a towering corporate vista down into a bustling, rain-slicked plaza before retreating under a sheltered urban structure. It begins by looking up at the massive Militech tower through foggy rain, slowly panning down to reveal a wet concrete plaza and a nearby curved overpass. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a crowded pedestrian area where the Petrochem building looms to the left and a large blue holographic koi fish swims through the air above reflective pavement. The camera then tilts upward to track a golden holographic koi joining the blue one against a muted, foggy sky filled with glowing corporate advertisements. Finally, the view shifts as the camera passes beneath the concrete and glass of the curved overpass, leaving the holographic fish behind to enter a sheltered zone of artificial light and staircases.
